title: Rustic Life on Pulau Ubin

segments.title: Island near Singapore
segments.audioText: A tiny island of Singapore sits just 17 kilometers away from the highly developed city-state.
segments.transcript: A tiny island of Singapore sits just 17 kilometers away from the highly developed city-state.
segments.translationZh: 新加坡一個細小島嶼，就喺呢個高度發展嘅城市國家 17 公里之外。

points.label: A tiny island of Singapore
points.explanationZh: 先聽主角：tiny island，即係一個細小島嶼。

points.label: sits just 17 kilometers away
points.explanationZh: sits 呢度係『位於』；just 強調距離好近。

points.label: highly developed city-state
points.explanationZh: highly developed 係『高度發展』；city-state 指城市國家。

segments.title: Small population
segments.audioText: The island of Pulau Ubin has a small population.
segments.transcript: The island of Pulau Ubin has a small population.
segments.translationZh: Pulau Ubin 呢個島人口好少。

points.label: The island of Pulau Ubin
points.explanationZh: of 後面係島名，聽到 Pulau Ubin 就知道地點。

points.label: has a small population
points.explanationZh: population 係人口；small population 即係人口少。

segments.title: Fewer residents now
segments.audioText: Chu Yok Choon is one of 30 people living there, down from almost 4,000 60 years ago.
segments.transcript: Chu Yok Choon is one of 30 people living there, down from almost 4,000 60 years ago.
segments.translationZh: Chu Yok Choon 係而家住喺嗰度嘅 30 人之一，而 60 年前曾經接近 4,000 人。

points.label: one of 30 people
points.explanationZh: one of 30 表示三十人之中其中一個，數字要聽清楚。

points.label: living there
points.explanationZh: living there 補充講『住喺嗰度嘅人』。

points.label: down from almost 4,000
points.explanationZh: down from 用嚟講數字由以前較高水平下降。

segments.title: Life and future
segments.audioText: Chu said he enjoys life on the rustic island but does not see much of a future for its community.
segments.transcript: Chu said he enjoys life on the rustic island but does not see much of a future for its community.
segments.translationZh: Chu 話佢享受呢個樸實島嶼嘅生活，但唔太睇到社區有好多未來發展。

points.label: enjoys life on the rustic island
points.explanationZh: enjoys life on... 係『享受喺某地生活』，rustic 帶出樸實、鄉郊感。

points.label: does not see much of a future
points.explanationZh: does not see much of a future 表示唔覺得有太多前景。

points.label: for its community
points.explanationZh: community 指當地居民群體，唔只係地方本身。

segments.title: Meaning of rustic
segments.audioText: Rustic describes things that are simple and usually have a rough wood-like appearance.
segments.transcript: Rustic describes things that are simple and usually have a rough wood-like appearance.
segments.translationZh: Rustic 用嚟形容簡單，而且通常有粗糙木質外觀嘅事物。

points.label: Rustic describes things
points.explanationZh: 定義句常用 describes things，表示呢個字用嚟形容某類事物。

points.label: simple
points.explanationZh: simple 呢度唔係負面，係簡樸、唔複雜。

points.label: rough wood-like appearance
points.explanationZh: rough 係粗糙；wood-like appearance 即係似木材嘅外觀。

sentences: A tiny island of Singapore sits just 17 kilometers away from the highly developed city-state.
The island of Pulau Ubin has a small population.
Chu Yok Choon is one of 30 people living there, down from almost 4,000 60 years ago.
Chu said he enjoys life on the rustic island but does not see much of a future for its community.
Rustic describes things that are simple and usually have a rough wood-like appearance.

vocabulary.example: A tiny island sits near the city.
vocabulary.translationZh: 一個細小島嶼位於城市附近。

vocabulary.example: Singapore is a highly developed city-state.
vocabulary.translationZh: 新加坡係一個高度發展嘅城市國家。

vocabulary.example: The island has a small population.
He enjoys life on the rustic island.
vocabulary.translationZh: 佢享受喺呢個樸實島嶼上生活。

vocabulary.example: The community has fewer people now.
The table has a rough wood-like appearance.
vocabulary.translationZh: 呢張枱有粗糙、似木材嘅外觀。

vocabulary.example: Rustic things often have a wood-like appearance.
vocabulary.translationZh: rustic 嘅事物通常有似木材嘅外觀。

phrases.example: The island sits just 17 kilometers away from the city.
Pulau Ubin has a small population.
The number is down from almost 4,000.

phrases.phrase: does not see much of a future
phrases.meaningZh: 唔太睇到有好多未來前景
phrases.example: He does not see much of a future for its community.
Rustic things may have a rough wood-like appearance.

speakingPractice.prompt: 由 00:04 開始跟讀第一句，留意 17 kilometers away 同 highly developed 嘅重音。
speakingPractice.example: A tiny island of Singapore sits just 17 kilometers away from the highly developed city-state.

speakingPractice.prompt: 重播 00:18，先寫低 one of 30、down from almost 4,000、60 years ago 三個數字重點。
speakingPractice.example: Chu Yok Choon is one of 30 people living there, down from almost 4,000 60 years ago.

speakingPractice.prompt: 用 has a small population 改句，講一個你知道嘅小鎮、島嶼或社區。
speakingPractice.example: This village has a small population.

speakingPractice.prompt: 用兩句英文複述：Pulau Ubin 喺邊？而家人口有咩變化？
speakingPractice.example: Pulau Ubin is a tiny island near Singapore. Its population is much smaller than 60 years ago.

notes: 先用每個時間點重播一句，盲聽時特別抓數字：17、30、4,000、60。
第三句資訊較密，可以拆成 one of 30 people / living there / down from almost 4,000。
跟讀 rustic island 時留意 rustic 嘅 /ʌ/ 音，唔好讀成 /uː/。
最後一句係定義句，適合看稿後再遮住文字，用自己聲音跟住節奏講一次。
